hdfc.title: HDFC Bank Credit Cards
hdfc.description: Explore a range of credit cards that suit your lifestyle and needs.
hdfc.noCardsFound: No cards match your current search/filters.
hdfc.whyChoose: Why Choose HDFC Bank Credit Cards?
hdfc.compareDesc: Compare cards and choose the best one.

0.q: How do I get my annual fee waived?
0.a: Most HDFC Credit Cards feature spend-based fee waivers. If you meet the minimum required annual spend limit (e.g. ₹50,000 for Freedom/MoneyBack+ or ₹1 Lakh for Millennia) within your card anniversary year, your annual membership fee is fully waived/reversed.

1.q: What are the eligibility criteria for HDFC Credit Cards?
1.a: Applicants generally need to be between 21 and 60 years old for salaried professionals (or up to 65 for self-employed). A healthy credit score (750+ CIBIL score) and stable monthly income (starting from ₹20,000 for entry-level cards) increase the approval rate significantly.

2.q: Can I apply for a secured card if I have a low CIBIL score?
2.a: Yes! HDFC offers FD-backed secured credit cards that require no income proofs, documentation audits, or CIBIL score checks. The credit limit is directly mapped to your Fixed Deposit (up to 90%), making it the fastest way to build credit history.
